questionHtml: Outline how scientists would determine whether the gene coding for PSY from daffodils has been taken up successfully by rice DNA.
markschemeHtml:
a. by detecting a marker/resistance/sequencing gene ✔
Accept PCR to detect the marker gene.

b. the offspring produce yellow rice ✔
